content: how is the position called when your legs are in front of your chest.
The position you are describing is called the "seated forward fold" or "paschimottanasana" in yoga.

content: I mean full knees to chest folded together close with arms
The position you are describing is called the "knee-to-chest pose" or "apanasana" in yoga.
